<!-- Thanks for adding to the family tree! -->

## What does this change?

<!-- e.g. "Adds my grandmother, Eleanor Smith" or "Fixes John's birth year" -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Each new person is a file in `src/content/people/` named like `firstname-lastname.md`
- [ ] `parents` and `spouses` use the file-name id of the relative (e.g. `john-smith`)
- [ ] Any photo is in `public/photos/` and referenced as `/photos/<id>.jpg`
- [ ] I ran `npm run validate` locally (optional — CI checks this too)
